## Problem

<!-- What maintenance situation isn't surfaced today? A concrete package that's mis-tiered helps. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- A new hard/soft signal? A new flag? A new data source (beyond deps.dev / npm / GitHub)? A different output? -->

## Which tier / axis
